mapper.sql: id, job_title, company_name, city, work_address, education_text, experience_text, salary_text, salary_min, salary_max, job_description, publish_time, data_batch_no, status
mapper.insert:
insert into recommend_result ( user_id, job_id, recommend_scene, recommend_type, location_score, position_score, skill_score, behavior_score, salary_score, final_score, rank_no, recommend_reason, batch_no ) values
( #{item.userId}, #{item.jobId}, 'recommend', 'content', #{item.cityScore}, #{item.contentScore}, #{item.contentScore}, (#{item.educationScore} + #{item.experienceScore}) / 2, #{item.salaryScore}, #{item.recommendScore}, #{item.rankNo}, #{item.reasonText}, #{item.batchNo} )
mapper.select: select rr.id as recommend_id, rr.job_id, j.job_title, j.company_name, j.city, j.work_address, j.education_text, j.experience_text, j.salary_text, j.salary_min, j.salary_max, j.job_description, j.publish_time, j.data_batch_no, rr.final_score as recommend_score, rr.skill_score as content_score, rr.location_score as city_score, rr.salary_score, rr.behavior_score as education_score, rr.behavior_score as experience_score, rr.recommend_reason as reason_text, rr.create_time from recommend_result rr inner join job_info j on rr.job_id = j.id where rr.user_id = #{userId} and rr.recommend_scene = 'recommend' and j.status = 1 order by rr.final_score desc, rr.rank_no asc, rr.id asc limit #{limit}
